title: VerilatedVarProps::totalSize was missing the first unpacked dim
body:
Throwing off the calculation. This looks like a simple off-by-one error.

The net effect is when running 'svSizeOfArray' from a DPI function, said calculation does not include the first unpacked dimension of the array. For instance, if I have a 'byte Data [3:0]', it returns 1 when it should return 4.


We appreciate your contributing to Verilator.  If this is your first commit, please add your name to docs/CONTRIBUTORS, and read our contributing guidelines in docs/CONTRIBUTING.adoc.


This is a one-character change... Is including my name in the contributors list appropriate?

Closes #2297
